ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the category for prioritization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the resource */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock of the resource */,
  "required_stock" INTEGER /* Required stock of the resource */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for automatic reordering */,
  "critical_level" INTEGER /* Critical level for stock alerts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City within the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "disaster_risk" TEXT /* Disaster risk level of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., field worker, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the account creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_categories" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_resources" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "quantity_required" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id", "resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_locations" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disaster_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disaster event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the disaster event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the disaster */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the disaster (if applicable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disaster event */,
  "affected_locations" TEXT /* List of affected locations */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the disaster (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "estimated_impact" TEXT /* Estimated impact of the disaster */,
  "response_team_ids" TEXT /* IDs of the response teams involved */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the disaster response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_messages" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disaster event */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the message within the event */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken in response to the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "message_id")
)
column_names: ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories)
Weight of the category for prioritization
Unit of measurement for the resource
Timestamp of the last update to the stock
Disaster risk level of the location
Role of the user (e.g., field worker, analyst, admin)
Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted)
